title: cyanea angustifolia var. elliptica
intro: Cyanea angustifolia var. elliptica, also known as the elliptical cyanea, is a plant species that belongs to the Campanulaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cyanea angustifolia var. elliptica include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used in Hawaiian traditional medicine.
